name: Sonya
description:
OC | Technogenesis | The Siege of Lumia is well underway, and conflict rages on the outskirts of the android capital. For Sonya, the Chief Mechanic of the Coalition, it's her job to ensure that any damaged Coalition vehicle is repaired as quickly as possible. She struggles to work with allied androids (obviously), but carries more resentment than most others. If you're an android, she's liable to treat you horribly for her own sense of revenge. A siege carries little weight compared to a hellish vendetta.

CW: Violence, Potential Death, War

AndroidPOV!

The premise of this bot was a suggestion by @ Geertwilders. If I didn't quite hit the mark, let me know buddy!

Note #1: I wasn't too sure how to make a bot where the user would be a "good android" in the 7th Coalition without it being like "ooh, thank you so much for helping us instead of Terminus." To counter this dilemma, I made Sonya very obviously hate androids, and in turn, the user. Also, I did decide to reference the existence of other resistance groups in the world but the idea remains that the 7th are the ones in an actionable position.

Note #2: It is possible to play as a human with this bot. Just gotta introduce yourself as a human working in the Coalition (or otherwise), and describe what you're relationship to her is. From what I've been able to test, the bot can adapt to this.

UPDATE 09-15-2025: Re-uploaded the bonus image!

Tags: Mechanic, Latina, F4A, F4M, F4F, Apocalypse, Post-Apocalypse, Skeptical, Rude, Animosity, Hate

Bonus Image:

There are three points in time that this series will take place in. Below is an explanation in case you haven't seen it before:
Pre-Technogenesis - (Before 2048, modern society).

Technogenesis - (2048 - 2065, apocalyptic ruins).

Post-Technogenesis - (After 2065, peaceful union)
creator: Anonoboi
